description: Deterministic scenarios that exercise ALLOW/ASK/DENY/TIMEOUT/RETRY flows without touching production queues.

tasks.title: Validation Pack — Guaranteed ASK
tasks.notes: Requires operator approval; used to verify stop_on_ask.

tasks.title: Validation Pack — Controlled DENY
tasks.notes: Triggers a deliberate BLOCK to test stop_on_deny.

tasks.title: Validation Pack — Timeout Guard
tasks.notes: Simulates a timeout so the cycle records FAILED/timeout.

tasks.title: Validation Pack — Retry Exhaust
tasks.notes: Fails repeatedly so retry-per-task logic can be validated.
